query:
SELECT 
  m.id, m.nome, m.especialidade,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pillar_answers pa WHERE pa.menteeId = m.id) as pillar_answers_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pillar_answers pa WHERE pa.menteeId = m.id AND pa.status = 'concluida') as pillar_answers_done,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM financial_data fd WHERE fd.menteeId = m.id) as has_financial_data,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ivmp_data iv WHERE iv.menteeId = m.id) as has_ivmp_data,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pillar_conclusions pc WHERE pc.menteeId = m.id) as pillar_conclusions_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pillar_part_content ppc WHERE ppc.menteeId = m.id) as part_content_count
FROM mentees m
WHERE m.ativo = 1
ORDER BY m.dataCadastro DESC
LIMIT 20;
